ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to enroll in the course */,
  "corequisite_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course has corequisites */,
  "elective_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is an elective */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the department's faculty */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the term is offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course being offered */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Section number for the course offering */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course offering */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course offering was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course offering was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES course_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course that has the prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the prerequisite course */,
  "corequisite_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the prerequisite is also a corequisite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prerequisite relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prerequisite relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term in which the student is enrolled */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the student is enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., 'enrolled', 'dropped', 'completed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES course_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1 for freshmen, 2 for sophomores) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instructor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor relationship */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term in which the course is taught */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is taught */,
  "teaching_assistant" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a teaching assistant for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course-instructor relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course-instructor relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES course_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* Reference to the course being scheduled */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term in which the course is scheduled */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is scheduled */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the course meets */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the course meets */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course meets */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of each class session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES course_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
